title: Uphold the Promise

sections.label: Intro
lines: With a heart full of honor, I rise today
To sing of the steadfast and walk in Your way

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I will sing of Your mercy, sing of Your grace
Hold Your truth like a banner, through every place
With a blameless heart, I’ll stand before You
In the quiet of morning, my promise renew

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In the halls of my heart, I prepare the throne
A dwelling for Your spirit, a place to call home

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will walk in the light, with no shadow near
Hold fast to Your truth, wipe away my fear
With a song of devotion, I will remain
In the arms of the holy, forever sustained

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I’ll turn from deceit, guard my soul from lies
Choose the path of the faithful, lift my eyes
No evil will dwell where Your light has shone
In the house of Your love, I’ll call it my own

sections.label: Bridge
lines: When the trials arise, and the darkness calls
I’ll stand on the rock that will never fall
With the voice of Your promise, I’ll shout Your name
Through the fire and flood, You remain the same

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will walk in the light, with no shadow near
Hold fast to Your truth, wipe away my fear
With a song of devotion, I will remain
In the arms of the holy, forever sustained

sections.label: Outro
lines: Through the days of my life, Your light will lead
To the gates of forever, where love is freed

epigraph: I will sing of mercy and judgment
